title: A way to know how a change would effect everything
excerpt: I think it would be a nice feature to understand how a change in a board (EX: deleting a column) would effect everything else (EX: other boards). I am an admin for my monday.com team, and I deleted a few columns to upgra…

posts.author: DariusDevitt (Darius Devitt)
posts.cookedHtml: I think it would be a nice feature to understand how a change in a board (EX: deleting a column) would effect everything else (EX: other boards). I am an admin for my monday.com team, and I deleted a few columns to upgrade their effectiveness with our automations and our mirrors. This unexpectedly ruined the automations and mirrors in boards that I did not have access to. If I had known this, I would have chosen to wait on my changes and make sure that the additional boards were ready to accept the new columns. Is there a way that all admins could have access to this kind of information, or get a notification about it effecting other boards? It is just a thought that I had and I am curious if anyone else has experienced similar issues and what could be done to make these transitions smoother. Thanks!
